hero.heading: Care that begins with
hero.subhead: A physician who believes great primary care belongs in the places people actually want to live.

drStewart.heading: Meet Dr.
drStewart.bio1: Dr. Stewart brings a thoughtful, patient-first approach to adult primary care — focused on building relationships over time and creating a more personal, unhurried experience.
drStewart.bio2: She trained at Emory, completed her residency at the University of Miami, and chose Vero Beach because she believes great primary care belongs in the places people actually want to live.

cta.heading: Ready to become a patient?
cta.subhead: New patients are welcome. Schedule your first visit in minutes.
